## Definition of Done (CLAUDE.md §24)
- [ ] Architecture honored (Tools/Agents/Framework Engine rules)
- [ ] Typed; lint, type-check, format pass
- [ ] Tests added (unit/integration; eval for AI changes; Tools tested directly)
- [ ] Tenancy & security checked; no secrets in code
- [ ] AI grounding & auditability (citations, structured outputs, logging, human gate)
- [ ] Docs/ADR updated; migration reversible (if schema changed)
